method: Capability parity against current official platform documentation; no marketing or aggregate competitor score.

criteria.capability: Source-backed artifact identity and provenance
criteria.evidence: Active items retain source paths, source text, hashes, and generated-data fingerprints.

criteria.capability: Explicit artifact versions and timestamps
criteria.evidence: Git history exists, but active item timestamps remain legacy-unknown and prompt versions are not first-class experiment inputs.

criteria.capability: Fast deterministic structural checks
criteria.evidence: Node and browser run the same deterministic six-factor lint and adversarial limitations are pinned.

criteria.capability: Versioned evaluation datasets with inputs, references, and metadata
criteria.evidence: Synthetic failure fixtures exist but no versioned behavioral dataset contract exists.

criteria.capability: Code graders for output correctness and format
criteria.evidence: Current checks inspect prompt text or echo it; they do not grade generated task outputs.

criteria.capability: Declared and calibrated model graders
criteria.evidence: No model judge runs or calibration records exist.

criteria.capability: Multi-provider and multi-model test matrix
criteria.evidence: The only configured provider is local echo.

criteria.capability: Immutable experiment records and accepted baselines
criteria.evidence: No baseline ID or accepted candidate experiment is persisted.

criteria.capability: Per-case and aggregate candidate-versus-baseline regression diffs
criteria.evidence: The console has no experiment comparison or regression budget.

criteria.capability: Randomized pairwise evaluation
criteria.evidence: No randomized pairwise evaluator or side-by-side output view exists.

criteria.capability: Adversarial model and agent red teaming
criteria.evidence: Named adversarial prompt requirements do not attack a live model or application target.

criteria.capability: Sandboxed tool execution and approval policy
criteria.evidence: Inspect AI is installed locally but no PromptOS task, sandbox, or approval policy runs.

criteria.capability: Message, token, time, work, cost, retry, and early-stop limits
criteria.evidence: No model evaluation run enforces bounded execution limits.

criteria.capability: Cost, token, latency, and error budgets
criteria.evidence: Echo smoke records no provider cost or latency distribution.

criteria.capability: Human rubric and pairwise annotation queues
criteria.evidence: No reviewer, rubric response, disagreement, or adjudication record exists.

criteria.capability: Evaluation on production traces
criteria.evidence: No production trace adapter or online evaluator exists.

criteria.capability: Promote observed failures into regression datasets
criteria.evidence: Manual feedback promotion is deterministic, but production capture and dataset versioning are absent.

criteria.capability: Reproducible logs, checkpoints, retry, and resume
criteria.evidence: Structural receipts and promptfoo output exist, but full experiment config and resumable run state do not.

criteria.capability: Local, offline artifact browsing and evaluation
criteria.evidence: The single-file console and local gates run with no model API.

criteria.capability: Windows and macOS package, signing, update, and clean-host lifecycle
criteria.evidence: No Tauri app or target-host release proof exists.
criteria.gate: No Windows or macOS release gate has passed.
